releaseNotes:
Updates
- In-app updates now run through a Node-based orchestrator instead of a nested PowerShell chain, so they work on PCs where PowerShell scripts are blocked by policy.
- Update log is reset at the start of each run, so old failures are no longer shown as current errors.
- Update status ignores log entries older than 45 minutes.
- Log timestamps now use local time consistently.

Stable PC / startup (from 0.2.9)
- Start Guest Booking with no command window — use Start Guest Booking.vbs.
- Fixed blank console window staying open in the background.

Vendor (dev PC)
- Publishing to the public update channel now uploads source zips correctly (uploads.github.com fix from 0.2.10).

Customer PCs on 0.2.9 or 0.2.10: use Settings → About → Apply update after this release is published, or run the manual release.ps1 command once if needed.
